Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: coverings and hangings by form [300185748], coverings and hangings by specific type [300185832], coverings and hangings [300205012], furnishings by form or function [300037342], furnishings (works) [300037336], Furnishings (hierarchy name) [300037335], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: floor coverings [300186091], coverings and hangings for surface elements [300236483], coverings and hangings by location or context [300197364], coverings and hangings by specific type [300185832], coverings and hangings [300205012], furnishings by form or function [300037342], furnishings (works) [300037336], Furnishings (hierarchy name) [300037335], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Heavy woven textiles used for a variety of utilitarian purposes essentially in the form in which they left the loom. In Western societies they are used primarily as floor coverings.
Textiles pesados usados para una variedad de propósitos utilitarios esencialmente en la forma en que dejaron el telar.
Zwaar geweven textiel voor allerlei gebruiksdoeleinden, grotendeels nog in de vorm waarin ze het weefgetouw hebben verlaten. In westerse gemeenschappen worden ze meestal als vloerbedekking gebruikt.

Fest gewebte Textilie, die für eine Vielzahl nützlicher Zwecke genutzt wird, hauptsächlich in der Form, wie sie vom Webstuhl kommt. In westlichen Gesellschaften wird sie hauptsächlich als Bodenbedeckung genutzt.

Source.Source_ID: 2000003701/Bacharach and Bierman, Warp and Weft of Islam (1979)
